category_sources: source_facts.description says convert source code to formatted text with syntax highlighting; official GitLab project information says source code to formatted text converter
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is highlight; official GitLab project title is highlight
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official highlight documentation page; official GitLab repository also provides README documentation
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://gitlab.com/saalen/highlight; per instruction repo is returned as null
tags_sources: official project information and homepage describe converting source code to formatted highlighted output
